title: HoloMUSH Invariant Registry
summary: Generated registry (from invariants.yaml) cataloguing named system invariants by scope (INV-CRYPTO, INV-PRIVACY, INV-SCENE, INV-PLUGIN, INV-EVENTBUS, INV-CLUSTER, INV-ACCESS, INV-SESSION, INV-STORE, INV-TELEMETRY, INV-BRANDING, INV-DOCS, INV-COMMAND, INV-COMM), each entry with ID, summary, legacy alias, and binding status.
